Dear Sir / Madam, 
 
Subject: Transcript of Presentation on Unaudited Financial Results for the quarter 
ended June 30, 2022 
 
In continuation of our letter dated August 02, 2022 and pursuant to Regulation 30(6) of the 
SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015, Transcript of 
Presentation on Unaudited Financial Results (Consolidated and Standalone) of the Company 
for the quarter ended June 30, 2022, is available on the Company’s website at  
https://www.torrentpower.com/pdf/investors/TorrentPowerQ1FY23InvestorcallTranscript_20220816151241.pdf    
 
You are requested to take the same on records. 
 
Thanking you, 
 
Yours faithfully, 
 
For Torrent Power Limited
